name: Sora
description: Sora is OpenAI's text-to-video generative model and the standalone iOS/Android app for creating short AI-generated video clips.

years.notes: Rounded-square plate with midnight-to-sky-blue gradient and a white cloud silhouette flanked by four-point sparkles, echoing the iOS app icon introduced for Sora's public release (December 2024) and retained through the Sora 2 refresh (September 2025).
